current_commit_message: Use a src directoy for package
Add info why the public API is so extensive
Move extensions and extension factory to separate module
Move extension helper functions also to extensions module
Drop support for Python 2.7 and Python 3.5
Add `Getting started` and a working `example application`
use gh actions instead of Travis CI (#67)
add test to make sure a destination is set
add test: underscores are not allowed for names in UploadSets
add test to make sure FileStorage has a name
fix test for autoserve when upload set is not defined
fix missing long description content type missing warning
make type checkers aware of the type annotations
add support for Python 3.11, drop support for Python 3.6
Drop Python 3.8 and 3.9 support, add Python 3.13
Security fix: prevent path traversal and extension bypass
